graph TD
A -->|forward| B
B -->|back| A
---
+----------+       
|          |       
|    A     |<--+   
|          |   |   
+----------+   |   
      |        |   
      |        |   
   forward   back  
      |        |   
      v        |   
+----------+   |   
|          |   |   
|    B     |---+   
|          |       
+----------+
